response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience well above the 6-year minimum, with direct production use of TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes across multiple roles. His most recent engineering position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, a strong match for the AI agent requirement. The primary gaps are the complete absence of Nest.js from his history, limited recent Kotlin/Java work, and an ongoing caregiving gap since October 2025. These concerns are real but outweighed by his demonstrated depth, strong TDD culture, and direct alignment with the hardest-to-find requirement on the spec.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq, matching the AI agent development requirement precisely
15+ years of full-stack production work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Kubernetes across multiple senior roles
Deep, demonstrable TDD culture: workshop creator, testing library author, and consistent practitioner across every engineering engagement
concerns: Nest.js is entirely absent from the resume despite being a listed primary framework requirement
Kotlin/Java exposure is confined to embedded and robotics work at Altom in 2016–2018 with no recent usage in the secondary backend services context
8-month caregiving gap (October 2025–present) may mean reduced exposure to the rapidly evolving TypeScript/AI tooling ecosystem
